name: Easy Herb Vinegars
recipeInstructions:
1. Put rinsed and dried herbs and any spices into a sterilized 750-ml wine bottle.
2. Add about 3 cups vinegar, filling to within 1/4 inch of the top.
3. Stop with a new cork.
4. Set aside for 2 to 3 weeks to steep.
5. The vinegar has a shelf life of at least 1 year.
With red wine vinegar:
1. Use 4 sprigs fresh curly-leaf parsley and 2 tbsp black peppercorns.
With white wine vinegar:
1. Use 4 sprigs fresh tarragon, or
2. Use 4 sprigs fresh rosemary.
With rice wine vinegar:
1. Use 4 sprigs fresh cilantro and 2 tbsp dried star anise.
